title: Discovery Call
detail: We talk through your product, audience, goals, and the platforms you need to win on.

title: Creative Strategy
detail: I shape the hooks, angles, and shot list around the buying moment you're after.

title: Production
detail: On-camera delivery and capture — drawing on real event-production experience.

title: Review
detail: You review the edit and request adjustments through a clear, low-friction round.

title: Delivery
detail: You get polished, platform-ready assets sized for launch, testing, and reuse.
